synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-50003 Oracle Linux 8 pcp bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50003
description:
[5.3.7-22.0.9]
- Merges new PCP nfsiostat parser in OL [Orabug: 38817091]

[5.3.7-22.0.8]
- pmdanfsclient: fix regex to correctly parse NFS op stats [Orabug: 38724884]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50003

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50003.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
